title: zornia areolata
intro: Zornia areolata, also known as the "Mexican clammy clover," is a leguminous plant species native to Mexico and the southern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Zornia areolata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Zornia areolata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
